details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Next version installed successfully on Arm64
details.comparison: Current pinned Flume version 1.10.0 passed smoke tests in this run. Regression validation downloaded candidate version 1.10.1 on Arm64, and the extracted distribution exposed the official flume-ng binary plus versioned core library layout for 1.10.1. Raw version output: Flume 1.10.1 Source code repository: https://git.apache.org/repos/asf/flume.git Revision: 047516d4bd5574c3e67a5d98ca2cfe025886df7c Compiled by rgoers on Sat Aug 13 11:16:08 MST 2022 From source with checksum de1cf990338c759d311522e65597e457
